comparisons.note: Python model uses fixed D_AA=7.0 um (Takenaka control at Pa=100).
Requires R autoregulation loop (D_AA=6.19 um); not in Python scope.
Requires R autoregulation loop (D_AA=5.73 um); not in Python scope.

pass_criterion: Pa=100 control Q_blood within 3% of MATLAB reference
scope_note: The Python port implements the glomerular surrogate at fixed D_AA=7.0 um. Validation of the full autoregulation pressure-flow curve (Pa=100-150 with varying D_AA from Takenaka 1994) requires the R autoregulation model (resources/code/autoreg_glommod/). Only the Pa=100 baseline (D_AA=7.0 um, control condition) is validated here.
